landing.heroSubtitle: Project Ledger lets you record expenses and income, manage payment methods, collaborate as a team and analyze your cash flow — all in one place, with AI that reads your receipts
landing.featuresDescription: Every tool you need to record, understand and optimize the money flow of your projects

dashboard.title: Per-project dashboard
dashboard.description: Centralize expenses, income and budget for each project in a clear panel. See the financial status in real time without opening spreadsheets.

paymentMethods.title: Payment methods with multi-currency
paymentMethods.description: Record which account or card each transaction comes from. Multi-currency support with automatic conversion to the project's currency.

ocr.title: AI OCR — automatic capture
ocr.description: Photograph a receipt or invoice and AI extracts the title, amount, date, reference number and more. Review and save in seconds.

team.title: Shared team projects
team.description: Invite collaborators with read or edit permissions. Everyone works on the same data in real time, without conflicts.

reports.title: Reports and analytics
reports.description: Generate expense and income reports by category, payment method, date range and more. Export and share with one click.

chatbot.title: AI chatbot on your data
chatbot.description: Ask the AI assistant (Aria) about your projects and payment methods. Available exclusively on the Premium plan.

categories.title: Expenses and income by category
categories.description: Organize each transaction with custom categories per project. Maintain accounting clarity without complications.

history.title: Complete and traceable history
history.description: Never lose a record. Every expense, income and change is saved with date, responsible party and receipt reference.

howItWorks.title: From zero to full control in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No steep learning curves. Set it up once, use it every day.

step1.title: Create your free account
step1.description: Sign up in seconds. No credit card. The Free plan gives you immediate access to 2 projects and essential features.

step2.title: Set up your project
step2.description: Create a project, define its currency, payment methods and categories. Invite your team if you work collaboratively.

step3.title: Record with AI or manually
step3.description: Upload a photo of the receipt so AI fills the form, or enter it manually. Every transaction is organized instantly.

step4.title: Analyze and decide better
step4.description: Check reports, ask the AI chatbot about your cash flow and make decisions based on real data.

speed.label: To record an expense with AI

landing.ctaSubtitleFull: Start today with the Free plan — no card, no expiration date. Upgrade whenever your project needs it.

errors.noConnection: Could not connect to the server to load plans.
errors.unauthorized: Could not validate the session to load plans.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to view plans.
errors.generic: Could not load plans at this time.
